title: Tem phieu va cach nau - Don gian, no long
subtitle: Boi canh thoi bao cap (1976-1986) - Phan phoi theo dinh luong - Am thuc va ky uc

sections.title: Tem phieu va dinh luong
sections.introduction: Thoi bao cap, nhieu mat hang nhu gao, thit, duong va vai voc duoc phan phoi theo tem phieu. Bua an gia dinh vi the gan lien voi su tiet kiem, su chia se va cach tan dung moi nguon luong thuc co san.

historicalDemand.title: Boi canh thoi bao cap
demands: Luong thuc duoc cap theo dinh luong va so nhan khau.
Nguon thuc pham khan hiem nen bua an thuong phai don them khoai, san hoac bo bo.
Moi gia dinh uu tien muc tieu no bung, giu suc va tiet kiem lau dai.

foundingActions.title: Bua an gia dinh
foundingActions.context: Trong nhieu gia dinh, mam com la noi the hien ro nhat tinh than vuot kho. Mon an co the gian di, nhung cach chuan bi, chia phan va nhuong nhau lai rat dam tinh than gia dinh.

proposal.quote: Am thuc thoi bao cap khong chi la chuyen no doi, ma con la ky uc ve su ben bi, su tan tien va tinh thuong trong moi nep nha.
proposal.author: Huong Vi Bao Cap
purpose: Giu no long trong dieu kien thieu thon.
Tan dung nguyen lieu dia phuong va theo mua.
Duy tri nep song tiet kiem trong gia dinh.
Luu lai ky uc cho the he sau.

historicElection.title: Nhung mon an tieu bieu
historicElection.date: Ky uc am thuc thoi bao cap
characteristics: Com don khoai, san hoac bap
Chao cam, chao loang cho bua kho
Banh bot mi hap, khoai luoc, san luoc
significance: Phan anh ro su thieu thon cua thoi ky phan phoi theo tem phieu.
The hien kha nang thich nghi cua moi gia dinh Viet Nam.
Tro thanh ky uc tap the cua nhieu the he da tung song trong giai doan nay.

outcome.event: Tai hien ky uc am thuc bao cap
outcome.result: Cac cau chuyen ve bua an gian di duoc gom lai thanh tu lieu hoc tap va trai nghiem.
outcome.legitimacy: Nhung mon an gian di nay giup ket noi lich su doi song voi cam nhan cua nguoi hoc hom nay.

sections.title: Cach nau don gian
sections.introduction: Nhieu mon an thoi bao cap co cach che bien rat co ban: vo sach, don them nuoc, nau mem va chia deu cho ca nha. Su don gian trong cach nau phan anh uu tien lon nhat khi ay la du no va de bao quan.

legislation.title: Nguyen lieu tai cho
legislation.description: Gao, ngo, khoai, san va bo bo la nhung nguyen lieu pho bien, de duoc phan phoi hoac tu trong trot. Cach nau an vi the xoay quanh viec tan dung toi da nhung gi san co.

constitutions.role: Hat cung duoc ngam, vo sach roi nau mem de thay mot phan com.
Gao duoc nau cung khoai, san hoac bap de tang do no cho ca nha.

statistics.otherDocuments: nguyen tac pho bien: no long, tiet kiem, tan dung

achievements.context: Cach nau va cach an deu uu tien su tiet kiem, tranh lang phi va phu hop voi dieu kien cung ung luc bay gio.

aspects.title: Ky uc am thuc
aspects.quote: Nhung mon an gian di nhat lai la dieu o lai lau nhat trong tri nho cua nhieu nguoi.
aspects.author: Huong Vi Bao Cap
aspects.description: Com don, bo bo hay chao cam khong duoc nho vi su phong phu, ma vi chung gan voi mot giai doan gia dinh cung nhau vuot qua kho khan.

aspects.title: Su thich nghi
aspects.description: Moi nha co mot cach xu ly nguyen lieu khac nhau, nhung diem chung la tan dung toi da va chia deu cho moi nguoi trong bua an.
actions: Don them khoai, san hoac bap vao noi com.
Nau loang hon de phan bua cho dong nguoi hon.
Uu tien tre nho va nguoi lao dong nang trong cach chia khau phan.

aspects.title: Nep song tiet kiem
requirements: Khong bo phi bat ky phan an nao con lai.
Tan dung nguyen lieu theo mua va theo kha nang duoc cap.
Giup tre nho hieu gia tri cua lao dong va hat gao.

sections.title: Phuc vu no long, vi gia dinh
sections.definition: Bua an thoi bao cap co the thieu thon, nhung gia tri con lai rat ro: giu suc, giu nep nha va giu tinh thuong trong gia dinh.

humanRights.title: Gia tri cua bua an gian di
humanRights.approach: Su gian di cua bua an khong lam giam y nghia cua no. Chinh trong dieu kien it lua chon, tinh thuong va su nhuong nhau cang tro nen de nhan thay.

categories.title: No long
categories.description: Muc tieu truoc het cua moi bua an la du suc cho sinh hoat va lao dong.

categories.title: Tiet kiem
categories.description: Nguyen lieu nao cung duoc can do, tan dung va che bien hop ly.

categories.title: Tinh thuong
categories.description: Nguoi lon thuong nhuong phan ngon hon cho tre nho va nguoi om yeu.

categories.title: Ky uc
categories.description: Nhung bua an gian di tro thanh mot phan ky uc tap the cua nhieu the he.

humanRights.revolutionaryGoal: Viec tai hien nhung mon an nay giup nguoi hoc hieu hon doi song xa hoi trong mot giai doan lich su gan gui va nhieu bien dong.
humanRights.constitutionalRecognition: Am thuc thoi bao cap la mot lop ky uc van hoa dac biet, gan voi tinh than vuot kho, tiet kiem va doan ket gia dinh.

humanisticLaw.title: Ket noi the he
humanisticLaw.abolishment: Nhung cau chuyen quanh bo bo, com don hay chao cam can duoc ghi lai nhu mot phan ky uc doi song, khong chi nhu ten goi cua mon an.

characteristics.title: Luu lai cau chuyen
characteristics.description: Moi mon an deu gan voi mot hoan canh cu the: thieu gao, thieu chat dot, dong con va can mot bua an de di qua ngay dai.

characteristics.title: Chia se trai nghiem
characteristics.description: Khi duoc ke lai trong lop hoc hay tren nen tang so, nhung ky uc nay tro thanh cau noi giua lich su va trai nghiem ca nhan.
characteristics.quote: Ky uc am thuc chi that su song khi no duoc ke lai va lang nghe.
characteristics.author: Huong Vi Bao Cap

characteristics.title: Nhin lai van hoa doi song
characteristics.description: Tu mot bua com don gian, nguoi hoc co the hieu them ve co che phan phoi, cach to chuc doi song va tam ly xa hoi cua mot thoi ky.

characteristics.title: Gia tri con lai
characteristics.description: Dieu dong lai sau cung khong chi la vi mon an ngon hay do, ma la tinh than ben bi va su yeu thuong trong gia dinh Viet Nam.

humanisticLaw.essence: Huong Vi Bao Cap la cau chuyen ve bua an gian di, ky uc tap the va suc song ben bi cua con nguoi Viet Nam.
